ab: Jiyax sngayang nii, musa nami qmita swayi snaw tama mu ka qbsuran mu kuyuh ni yaku.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: Paah nami Taipei papa tdruy qrngul musa Taitung.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: Dhuq Taitung do mgriq tdruy miyah smtrung pyaan tdruy mnan ka ririh tama.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: Aji thiyaq bi ka knthyaqan sapah ririh tama ni pyaan tdruy, mgriq cicih tdruy do dhuq da.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: Dalih sapah ririh tama hiya o niqan 1 paru bi tbgan. Mseupu nami peapa tdruy gakat dhuq tbgan.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: Mniq tbgan do madas mnan ka ririh tama tmabug mirit ni peapa ema.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: Keeman do musa nami sbrigan paru alang mkan nhapuy.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: Ska paru alang o lala bi tdruy, kiya ni papa nami tdruy utubay/pupuk musa hiya.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: Mtealax bi siida do, duwa hlayan ka tdruy utubay wada guyun da. Asi nami papa tdruy bahu tealax.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: Miyah nami dhuq Taipei ka sayang da. Ini klai ririh tama gaga na hlayan ka tdruy utubay na dhug.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
